memory_entries.text: In jd/tenacity, wait strategies are in tenacity/wait.py. wait_exponential stores multiplier, min, max, exp_base and converts min/max with _utils.to_seconds; __call__ clamps as max(max(0, self.min), min(result, self.max)). wait_exponential_jitter is around line 240 and tests are tests/test_tenacity.py::TestWaitConditions::test_wait_exponential_jitter, _min, _timedelta.
